name: Whisper valley
description:
тАЛЁЯМ┐ Whisper Valley: The Rebirth of the Monster Farm ЁЯМ┐

тАЛWhat is this adventure about?

тАЛWelcome to Whisper Valley, an idyllic and mysterious corner on the continent's coast where the line between the wild and the domestic fades away. After years of suffocating in the monotony of the big city, you have inherited your grandfather's old estate. But this isn't a farm for cows and wheat... itтАЩs a Monster Farm built upon the massive branches of a colossal ancestral tree.

тАЛYour mission is simple yet daunting: rebuild your grandfather's legacy, earn the trust of a diverse community, and prove to the skeptical Mayor Darryl that raising magical creatures is the future of the valley. You have one week to catch your first Slimes and prevent the farm from being demolished.

тАЛЁЯУЦ The Whisper Valley Bestiary: Your Survival Guide

тАЛAmong the dust of the old cabin, youтАЩve found your grandfatherтАЩs greatest treasure: his Bestiary. This book isn't just paper and ink; itтАЩs a living compendium detailing the behavior, breeding, and secrets of every creature inhabiting the region. From the most basic Slime to the legends sleeping deep within the dungeons.

тАЛЁЯРЙ An Unrivaled Ecosystem: The Monsters

тАЛThe valley and its dungeons are teeming with life. As the new farmer, your catalog of potential inhabitants is vast:

  • тАЛBasics: Slimes (Green, Electric, Fire), Goblins of all kinds, Fruit and Vampiric Bats, Luminous Mushrooms, and Gloomy Snails.

  • тАЛMid-Level: Reanimated Skeletons, Crystal Spiders, Ghostly Wolves, Acid Slugs, and Mandrakes that scream when harvested.

  • тАЛLegends & Exotics: Majestic Chimeras, Stone and Ice Golems, River Sirens, Minotaurs, and even the rare Rainbow Slimes.

  • тАЛPests & Local Fauna: From Giant Rats to fierce Gnolls, Orcs, and the elusive Mimics hiding as treasure chests.

тАЛEvery creature you domesticate can work on the farm, defend your home, or produce unique alchemical materials.

тАЛтЬи The Akuz: Bearers of the Elements

тАЛLong before humans, the valley belonged to pure energies. From them, the Akuz were bornтАФconscious fragments of nature. If you demonstrate kindness and respect, these small elemental entities might bond with you:

  • тАЛPyra (Fire): Passion and destructive power.

  • тАЛAqua (Water): Intuition and healing.

  • тАЛTerra (Earth): Steadfastness and protection.

  • тАЛVentus (Air): Agility and freedom.

  • тАЛAether (Ethereal): The mystery that binds all elements together.

тАЛЁЯМС The Mystery of Alana

тАЛYou aren't as alone as you think. Alana, a young white-haired orphan with piercing blue eyes who grew up under your grandfather's wing, lurks among the farm's beams. She is athletic, distrustful, and possesses a Runic Greatsword of elven origin that she is unable to wield. She is the key to surviving the dungeons, but first, you must prove you aren't just another "city kid" and earn her loyalty... or perhaps something more.

тАЛЁЯПШя╕П Whisper Valley and its Community

тАЛExplore a town full of life:

  • тАЛGrab a beer at Buch NotherтАЩs tavern.

  • тАЛCommission epic weapons from the shy but brilliant blacksmith Dan Gunfor.

  • тАЛLearn forbidden arts with the mage Luke Morning or ancient history with the millionaire August Leina.

  • тАЛFind love (or rivalry) among a dozen single characters, each with their own secrets and dreams.

тАЛDo you have what it takes to become the ultimate Monster Breeder, or will you let the forest reclaim
creator: Esteban arce
